summary: Ukrainian forces destroyed a Russian TOS-1A MLRS using a Bulava loitering munition followed by FPV drones, while also targeting two Russian soldiers on motorcycles assaulting their positions. In the Donbas and Krasny Liman directions, the Russian "Rubicon" Center reported 112 targets destroyed on April 20, 2026, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, with coordination between Russian Aerospace Forces and ground units. The 66th Separate Mechanized Brigade evacuated a wounded soldier under heavy fire, and the 35th Marine Brigade’s 2nd Battalion continued operations against Russian drones, maintaining control of the Ukrainian sky. Ukrainian electronic warfare interference was demonstrated in a meme showing an FPV drone being forced to land, and soldiers of the 36th Marine Brigade survived a Russian FPV attack in the Kostiantynivka direction after detecting the drone with a detector.
